name: Apple Dapple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, salad oil, and sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour, salt, and baking soda to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
3. Stir in vanilla extract, apples, and pecans until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Grease a ring pan with additional salad oil.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for about 15 minutes.
8. In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar, butter, and milk. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is just beginning to boil.
9. Remove from heat and pour the hot topping evenly over the warm cake.
10. Allow the cake to set completely before serving.
